rationale: Elec. Code §146.054 governs write-in candidacy filing deadlines and is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 146.054. FILING DEADLINE. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a declaration of write-in candidacy must be filed not later than 5 p.m. of the fifth day after the date an application for a place on the ballot is required to be filed.
_note: Rule text concerns election filing deadlines; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
